0.q: Heterologous expression in salt sensitive yeast mutant AXT3 complemented for the loss of yeast vacuolar NHX1 under NaCl, KCl and LiCl stress indicating that VrNHX1 was the orthologue of ScNHX1.
Ectopic expression of the Na+/H+ exchanger 1 (VrNHX1) from Vigna radiata L. Wilczek in indica rice improves salinity tolerance.

2.q: Plant vacuolar NHX exchangers play a significant role in adaption to salt stress by compartmentalizing excess cytosolic Na+ into vacuoles and maintaining cellular homeostasis.
